name: Texas Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 small jalapeno or 3 serranos, chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes, onion, jalapeno (or serranos), and cilantro finely.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
3. Stir in 1 teaspoon of salt for each tomato used.
4. Mix until well combined.
5. Allow the salsa to sit at room temperature for several hours or overnight before consuming.
The author suggests processing the salsa in a food processor and using it within 3 hours, but this recipe keeps well in the refrigerator for several days. If serranos are used, the heat may diminish by the next day. Enjoy on taco salads, baked potatoes, or as a vegetable dish once most of the heat has subsided.
